title: Pondicherry University Results 2026 Key Highlights

detail.title: Pondicherry University Results 2026 Key Highlights
detail.short_info: Pondicherry University Result 2026 released for B.Com (Foreign Trade, Co-operative Management, General), B.Voc Office Administration, B.Sc Aquaculture, B.Sc Zoology, B.Sc Botany, B.Ed Two Year and B.Sc Nursing 1st to 6th semester CR scheme exams on the official website - pondiuni.edu.in via exam.pondiuni.edu.in/results/ on 31-03-2026. Check the direct link provided here and the steps to download the Pondicherry University result.

content.text: Pondicherry University has declared the Pondicherry University Result 2026 for a wide range of undergraduate CR scheme semester examinations for the 2025-26 academic session. The latest result list dated 31-03-2026 includes B.Com (Foreign Trade) I-VI semester, B.Com (Co-operative Management) I-VI semester, B.Com (General) I-VI semester, B.Voc Office Administration and Secretarial Assistance I-V semester, B.Sc Aquaculture I-III & V semester, B.Sc Zoology I-V semester, B.Sc Botany I-V semester, B.Ed (Two Year) I-III semester and I-II year, and B.Sc Nursing I-VI semester. Pondicherry University Result 2026 has been released online on the official exam portal - exam.pondiuni.edu.in/results/ - linked from pondiuni.edu.in.

Students can now log in to the examination results portal, locate their course code and title from the results list and then enter their Register/Roll Number and semester details to download their provisional marksheet. After checking their subject wise marks, credits and result status, they should verify personal details and contact the university or college examination section if any discrepancy is found or if revaluation is required.

Pondicherry University has rolled out a comprehensive UG CR result batch that spans commerce, vocational, life sciences, education and nursing programmes from 1st to 6th semesters, complementing earlier March 2026 UG releases for B.Tech, BSc, BCA, BBA and other B.Voc courses. All these results are accessible via the central online results page, where students can search by course code and then open their specific result link.

Pondicherry University lists all active UG and PG results on a single Examination Results page, where each entry shows the course code, course name, semester, scheme and result date. Students can reach the portal using the link below and then select the appropriate course entry (such as BFT1, BCM1, BCOM1, BVOS1, BSAQ1, BSZL2, BSBO2, BED1/BED2, BSCN2).

sections.heading: How to Check Pondicherry University Result 2026

content.text: Follow these steps to check and download your Pondicherry University UG Result 2026 for B.Com, B.Voc, B.Sc, B.Ed or B.Sc Nursing:

items: Go to the official exam results page: https://exam.pondiuni.edu.in/results/.

On the results list, locate your course code and title, for example: BFT1 - B.Com (Foreign Trade) I-VI Semester BCM1 - B.Com (Co-operative Management) I-VI Semester BCOM1 - B.Com (Bachelor of Commerce) I-VI Semester BVOS1 - B.Voc (Office Administration and Secretarial Assistance) I-V Semester BSAQ1 - B.Sc Aquaculture I-III, V Semester BSZL2 - B.Sc Zoology I-V Semester; BSBO2 - B.Sc Botany I-V Semester BED1/BED2 - B.Ed (Two Year) I-III Semester / I-II Year BSCN2 - B.Sc Nursing I-VI Semester.
BFT1 - B.Com (Foreign Trade) I-VI Semester
BCM1 - B.Com (Co-operative Management) I-VI Semester
BCOM1 - B.Com (Bachelor of Commerce) I-VI Semester
BVOS1 - B.Voc (Office Administration and Secretarial Assistance) I-V Semester
BSAQ1 - B.Sc Aquaculture I-III, V Semester
BSZL2 - B.Sc Zoology I-V Semester; BSBO2 - B.Sc Botany I-V Semester
BED1/BED2 - B.Ed (Two Year) I-III Semester / I-II Year
BSCN2 - B.Sc Nursing I-VI Semester.
Click on the Result link corresponding to your course entry; this opens the result input page.
Enter your Register/Roll Number and select the appropriate Exam Year/Semester if prompted.
Click on Submit / Get Result to view your provisional marksheet.

Check your personal details, course name, semester, subject wise marks, credits and overall result status, then download or print the marksheet for academic use, revaluation, scholarship and admission processes.
